---
title: Tags
---

Browse posts by topic:

<!-- Tag cloud will be generated by blog-tags CGI -->
<div id="tag-cloud" hx-get="/cgi/blog-tags" hx-trigger="load" hx-swap="innerHTML">
  <p class="loading-tags" aria-live="polite">
    <span class="loading-spinner" aria-hidden="true"></span>
    <em>Loading tags...</em>
  </p>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  function toKey(value) {
    return String(value || '').trim();
  }

  function setFromArray(items) {
    var set = new Set();
    items.forEach(function (item) {
      if (item) {
        set.add(item);
      }
    });
    return set;
  }

  function intersectSets(a, b) {
    var out = new Set();
    a.forEach(function (item) {
      if (b.has(item)) {
        out.add(item);
      }
    });
    return out;
  }

  function copySet(source) {
    return setFromArray(Array.from(source || []));
  }

  function initTagFilters() {
    var container = document.getElementById('tag-cloud');
    if (!container) {
      return;
    }

    var tagButtons = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll('.tag-cloud .tag[data-tag]'));
    var posts = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll('.tag-results-list .tag-result-item[data-post-url]'));
    var emptyState = container.querySelector('.tag-results-empty');
    if (!tagButtons.length || !posts.length) {
      return;
    }

    var tagToPosts = {};
    var originalCounts = {};
    var allPosts = new Set();
    var selected = new Set();

    posts.forEach(function (item) {
      var url = toKey(item.getAttribute('data-post-url'));
      var tagsCsv = toKey(item.getAttribute('data-post-tags'));
      if (!url || !tagsCsv) {
        return;
      }
      allPosts.add(url);

      tagsCsv.split(',').map(toKey).filter(Boolean).forEach(function (tag) {
        if (!tagToPosts[tag]) {
          tagToPosts[tag] = new Set();
        }
        tagToPosts[tag].add(url);
      });
    });

    tagButtons.forEach(function (button) {
      var tag = toKey(button.getAttribute('data-tag'));
      var countNode = button.querySelector('.tag-count');
      originalCounts[tag] = countNode ? countNode.textContent : '';
      button.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
        event.preventDefault();
        if (!tag) {
          return;
        }
        var multiSelect = !!(event.shiftKey || event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey);
        if (multiSelect) {
          if (selected.has(tag)) {
            selected.delete(tag);
          } else {
            selected.add(tag);
          }
        } else {
          selected.clear();
          selected.add(tag);
        }
        render();
      });
    });

    function resultSetForSelection(selectionSet) {
      if (!selectionSet.size) {
        return copySet(allPosts);
      }
      var ordered = Array.from(selectionSet);
      var seed = copySet(tagToPosts[ordered[0]] || new Set());
      for (var i = 1; i < ordered.length; i += 1) {
        seed = intersectSets(seed, tagToPosts[ordered[i]] || new Set());
      }
      return seed;
    }

    function render() {
      var activeResults = resultSetForSelection(selected);

      tagButtons.forEach(function (button) {
        var tag = toKey(button.getAttribute('data-tag'));
        var countNode = button.querySelector('.tag-count');
        if (!countNode) {
          return;
        }

        var isSelected = selected.has(tag);
        button.classList.toggle('tag-selected', isSelected);
        button.setAttribute('aria-pressed', isSelected ? 'true' : 'false');

        if (!selected.size) {
          countNode.textContent = originalCounts[tag] || countNode.textContent;
          return;
        }

        var probe = copySet(selected);
        if (!probe.has(tag)) {
          probe.add(tag);
        }
        var count = resultSetForSelection(probe).size;
        countNode.textContent = '(' + String(count) + ')';
      });

      posts.forEach(function (item) {
        var url = toKey(item.getAttribute('data-post-url'));
        item.style.display = activeResults.has(url) ? '' : 'none';
      });

      if (emptyState) {
        emptyState.hidden = activeResults.size !== 0;
      }
    }

    render();
  }

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initTagFilters);
  document.body.addEventListener('htmx:afterSwap', function (event) {
    if (event && event.target && event.target.id === 'tag-cloud') {
      initTagFilters();
    }
  });
})();
</script>
